title: selaginella quartiniana
intro: Selaginella quartiniana, also known as the African spikemoss, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella quartiniana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Selaginella quartiniana is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is commonly used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
